statements.select:
SELECT 'G' AS DSRC, A.CPID, F.CTID, A.SENTERDATE, A.FENTERDATE , A.STDATE, A.FTDATE , A.CLASSCNAME, A.ORGNAME , NVL(F.CTNAME,'其他') AS CLASSPOS , J.HOURRANNAME FROM CLASS_PLAN_INFO A LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K ON K.TMID=A.TMID WHERE 1=1
AND ( TO_CHAR(A.STDATE,'yyyy/MM') >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#STDATEBIND#,'yyyy/MM/dd'),'yyyy/MM') AND TO_CHAR(A.STDATE,'yyyy/MM') <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#FTDATEBIND#,'yyyy/MM/dd'),'yyyy/MM') )
AND TO_CHAR(A.STDATE,'yyyy/MM') >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#STDATEBIND#,'yyyy/MM/dd'),'YYYY/MM')
AND ( A.CLASSCNAME LIKE '%' || #CLASSCNAME# || '%' OR K.TRAINNAME LIKE '%' || #CLASSCNAME# || '%' OR A.PURPOSE LIKE '%' || #CLASSCNAME# || '%' OR A.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #CLASSCNAME# || '%' )
AND A.COMIDNO IN ( $ORGIDITEM$ )
ORDER BY SENTERDATE, FENTERDATE, STDATE, FTDATE,CPID
ORDER BY $SORTFIELD$
DESC

SELECT A.CPID /*ID流水號*/ , A.CLASSCNAME /*課程名稱*/ , NVL(A.DEFSTDCOST,0) DEFSTDCOST /*訓練費用_學員負擔*/ , NVL(A.DEFMAINCOST,0) DEFMAINCOST /*訓練費用_政府負擔*/ , NVL(A.DEFUNITCOST,0) DEFUNITCOST /*訓練費用_訓練費用*/ , A.COMIDNO /*訓練單位統編*/ , A.ORGNAME /*訓練單位名稱*/ , A.THOURS /*訓練時數*/ , NVL(D.CTNAME,'其他') || Z.ZIPNAME || TADDRESS TADDRESS /*訓練位置*/ , NVL(KH.HOURRANNAME,'') HOURRANNAME /*訓練時段*/ , CASE WHEN A.CONTACTPHONE IS NOT NULL THEN A.CONTACTPHONE ELSE (SELECT PHONE FROM ACCOUNT WHERE COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND ROWNUM =1 ) END CONTACTPHONE /*聯絡電話*/ , A.CONTACTNAME /*聯絡人*/ , A.STDATE, A.FTDATE, A.SENTERDATE, A.FENTERDATE /*, TO_CHAR(A.STDATE ,'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ～ ' || TO_CHAR(A.FTDATE ,'YYYY/MM/DD') TDATE */ /*訓練起迄日*/ /*, TO_CHAR(A.SENTERDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ～ ' || TO_CHAR(A.FENTERDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') ENTERDATE*/ /*報名起迄日*/ , DECODE(A.TRAINICE,'0','不拘','1','職前','2','在職','') TPROPERTY /*訓練類型*/ /*EJOBW-1503*/ , A.TNUM /*訓練學員數*/ , A.EXAMDATE /*, TO_CHAR(A.EXAMDATE ,'YYYY/MM/DD') EXAMDATE*/ /*甄試日期*/ , A.MSGCHANNEL /*課程揭露管道*/ , A.HOURSMEMO2 MEMO /*備註*/ /* == 課程內容 == */ , KT.TRAINNAME /*訓練職類*/ , A.PURPOSE /*訓練概要*/ , A.CONTENT /*課程內容*/ /* == 參訓資格 == */ , CASE WHEN A.CAPSEX = 'M' THEN '男' WHEN A.CAPSEX = 'F' THEN '女' ELSE '不限' END CAPSEX_TEXT /*性別*/ , A.CAPAGE1 ||' ～ ' || A.CAPAGE2 CAPAGE /*年齡*/ , KD.NAME CAPDEGREE_TEXT /*學歷*/ ,CASE A.CAPMILITARY WHEN '00' THEN '不分' WHEN '02' THEN '未役' WHEN '04' THEN '在役' WHEN '013' THEN '役畢(含免役)' ELSE A.CAPMILITARY END CAPMILITARY_TEXT /*兵役*/ , A.CAPOTHER1 /*其他一*/ , A.CAPOTHER2 /*其他二*/ , A.CAPOTHER3 /*其他三*/ FROM CLASS_PLAN_INFO A LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP Z ON Z.ZIPCODE = A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY D ON D.CTID = Z.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_DEGREE KD ON KD.DEGREEID=A.CAPDEGREE LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN KH ON KH.HRID = A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE KT ON KT.TMID = A.TMID WHERE A.CPID=#CPID#
